Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,343Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 3

entry.title: Sparked Rivalry
entry.summary:
Author: quackquackcey

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 16,787Chapters: 4/4Kudos: 8

Summary: Hockey stars Derek and Stiles are rivals on the ice, but little does anyone know that they’ve been friends with benefits off the ice for years. Both know that anything more is a danger to their hockey careers, regardless of their emotions—will they be able to breathe free and unshackled together, or will they suffocate under the pressures in their way?~ 🏒💫

entry.title: Seraph's Lament
entry.summary:
Author: GrimReaperlover11

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,290Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 12

Summary: Raguel, the seraph of justice, vengeance, redemption, and harmony witnessed the war and the fall...and he hated it, this was not harmony...this was not justice. entry.title: Nothing Like Losing a Limb
entry.summary:
Author: ash_mcj

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 54,231Chapters: 11/?Kudos: 1,183

Summary: “I’m okay,” Derek said, but it sounded just as much like a lie as it felt. “I mean…not really, but y’know. My control is shit, and not having Stiles around doesn’t help.” “I’m sure he’s taking it hard, too,” Paige told him gently—and she had no idea how right she was. Stiles was having some serious issues, and the fiasco from that morning at the hospital was still weighing heavy on Derek’s mind. “I always heard losing a member of your pack is like losing a limb, but it’s not. It’s…more like I’m the limb, and I’ve lost the body.” - Once the smoke dissipated after the tragedy at Hale Manor, the surviving members of the pack were scattered like ash in the wind. They might have escaped the flames that night—but none of them came out unscathed. [or: derek self-destructs, allison finds strength in the other side of her bloodline, cora and malia learn to survive in treacherous conditions, jackson attempts to function without his other half, and the stilinskis develop a habit of picking up strays—but who could really blame them?]

entry.title: An Endless Road to (re)Discover
entry.summary:
Author: evvrythingisawesome

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 28,312Chapters: 16/?Kudos: 28

Summary: Sheriff Stilinski recovers from his injury and tries to keep the pack together in the absence of their Alpha; Chris Argent struggles with guilt over his role in the pack's recent troubles; Teal'c tries to balance his responsibilities to the pack with his obligations to the Free Jaffa Nation and the SGC; Daniel Jackson supports Derek through his quest for the truth of his lost Hale ancestor and his search for his sister.

entry.title: Every Flavor of You
entry.summary:
Author: ProLuna

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 11,463Chapters: 6/40Kudos: 19

Summary: Derek Hale is a high school student who does his best to keep to himself. Until, he ends up with Stiles Stilinski as a lab partner. Derek is an unmovable object, but Stiles is an unstoppable force, and their meeting has consequences across the multiverse. This is a multiverse story. There is (temporary) major character death, and universes where minor characters have long been dead. There are a lot of stopovers into non-graphic portrayals of lots of different classic AUs. This includes a brief time where they are in an A/B/O AU and where there is brief mpreg. There are lots of other AUs they will stop in, but I wanted to list those two things in particular in case they squick anyone out so badly that even non-graphic representations of them are too much, so you can make your own choices. This story was originally my NaNoWriMo project, posted on my Tumblr. It is now complete and fully edited for AO3. The essence of the story hasn't changed, but I had to do a lot of pacing and characterization edits that weren't possible at the speed of NaNo.

entry.title: Blushing Sourwolf
entry.summary:
Author: Jinxy143

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,652Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 101

Summary: Stiles discovers something absolutely lethal: Derek Hale blushes when flirted with. What starts as a hilarious pack bet "Bet you fifty bucks you can’t turn him into a tomato" quickly spirals when Stiles realises he can’t stop pushing. The teasing, the lingering looks, the deliberate invasion of personal space — it all leads to one very heated night where Derek finally snaps, pins Stiles against a wall, and shows him exactly what happens when you push him too far. A fluffy, smutty Sterek one-shot.

entry.title: Some Of Us Are Human
entry.summary:
Author: Kass_Writes

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 50,713Chapters: 19/?Kudos: 1,034

Summary: In which Stiles is kicked out of Scott’s pack and the Sheriff is tired of Scott McCall hurting his son. He calls in reinforcements and those reinforcements come to clean up the mess of Beacon Hills while also kicking some serious True Alpha ass. Scott McCall will learn one thing by the time it’s all over………………….. No one is allowed to hurt Stiles EVER.

entry.title: If I could turn back time..... oh wait, I can!
entry.summary:
Author: Werewolfintraining

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 65,937Chapters: 20/?Kudos: 298

Summary: Agent Stilinski received the call late afternoon. He had to return to the Hellmouth in a hurry. He really thought there was enough time. He was prepared to face the demon once again. He was not prepared to see Derek Hale sacrifice himself, again.He has one chance, the cost is high, but Derek and his pup are worth it.He's willing to pay whatever the magic deems worthy.He pays in years, but he gains something unexpected.Ok. Now he's here. Is he supposed to save Peter too?

entry.title: My Husband, His Wife, and the Existential Crisis
entry.summary:
Author: DarkInsanity (Stereklenidus)

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 7,914Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 21

Summary: The truth is worse than amnesia: Stiles isn't their prince. He never was. When Stiles falls through ancient magic, he wakes up in a Viking werewolf kingdom as the consort of Jarl Derek Hale. The court thinks he's lost his memory. Derek looks at him like he's everything. But Stiles remembers everything. His Derek. His world. And this Derek already has a wife—Lady Paige—whom he kisses in front of Stiles like it's normal. Stiles is furious, crushed, and devastatingly jealous of a man who never promised him anything. Because this Derek chose him as his mate. And then he married someone else anyway. --- Or: The one where Stiles gets isekai'd into his own nightmare, everyone thinks he has amnesia, and he has to watch his Derek's doppelgänger be married to another woman while pretending he doesn't care. He cares. A lot.

entry.title: Stiles Stilinski: Emotional Support Human & Werewolf Chew Toy
entry.summary:
Author: Jinxy143

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 120,103Chapters: 19/?Kudos: 235

Summary: Stiles has options. You’re just along for the ride — so hop into Roscoe and see where this goes.Bring your Stiles body pillow. You might need it. Scott gets bitten.Everything changes. Suddenly, the world is louder, sharper, and a whole lot more dangerous — and the only thing keeping Scott from losing control is his loud-mouthed, chaos-magnet best friend, Stiles. Which would be fine.Except it’s not just Scott. Derek’s watching.Peter’s interested.And for some reason, everyone is getting a little too intense about Stiles Stilinski. Now Stiles is stuck in the middle of werewolves, bad decisions, and a rapidly escalating situation he definitely did not sign up for — while trying very hard not to think about what it means to be the thing grounding them all. Because this?This is not normal. And it’s only going to get worse.

entry.title: Performance Review
entry.summary:
Author: Nightowl_22

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,038Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 54

Summary: After a long day at the office, Derek Hale expects nothing more than to finish his paperwork and head home. Instead, his best employee, Stiles Stilinski, walks into his office demanding answers about his performance review—and refusing to leave until he gets what he wants. What starts as a tense conversation about raises quickly spirals into something far more dangerous when Stiles offers to help his married, closeted boss "blow off some steam." Before Derek knows it, he’s bent over his own desk, taking his employee's massive cock like the desperate size queen he’s tried so hard to hide. Or the one where Derek Hale is a straight, married boss who gets absolutely railed by his younger, hung employee on company time—that leaves him leaking and asking for round two the next night.

entry.title: Another Poly Story
entry.summary:
Author: HolmesMoriarty

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 6,417Chapters: 2/?Kudos: 68

Summary: “That’s what I wanted to talk to you about.” Stiles’ world falls apart after hearing this. It was a normal day, like any other, when his boyfriend of five years prepared a meal for them inside their apartment. Stiles thought he would be getting engaged tonight because he had never seen Derek cook even once. It was always Stiles’ thing, so he expected something, but not that.... “Stiles?” Derek asks as Stiles is frozen in place. His boyfriend sighs. “You don’t like the idea.” Of course, Stiles doesn’t!!! “What... Derek.” He closes his eyes, trying to breathe correctly. “Where is this coming from?” Derek opens his mouth, but Stiles isn’t done. “We’ve been together for five years, not once you expressed that you might be polyamorous. Not even once. So, you, asking out of the blue to open our relationship, doesn’t make much sense.”

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: A Whole Lot of Love
entry.summary:
Author: AnOldFriendForDinner

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 15,133Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 53

Summary: Stiles would do anything for the pack despite thinking he only belongs on the fringes. When he starts to spiral, Derek and Peter realise just what they'd do for him in return. If his happiness is a battle, then Derek and Peter are determined to make sure Stiles wins — through hell and high water, healing, and a relationship as unconventional as they are, they'll do anything to keep him safe.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply
